title: Get Activity Time Series by Date
description: Retrieves the activity data for a given resource over a period of time by specifying a date and time period. The response will include only the daily summary values.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource of the data to be returned. See supported values in the Resource Options section.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The end date of the period specified in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today .

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The range for which data will be returned. Supported: 1d | 7d | 30d | 1w | 1m | 3m | 6m | 1y

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: Returns the response from the specified timezone. Supported: UTC

response_fields.name: activities-<resource> : datetime
response_fields.description: The date of the recorded resource in the format yyyy-MM-dd.
